series_metadata.series_description: File contains Hard copy ID badge request forms, vendor security access request forms, Lausche Lottery visitor log, temporary ID card/parking pass log; ID cards issued, and card swipe transactions are recorded electronically.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital information on ID cards in system one (1) year separation of employee or vendor employee. digital logs of ID card swipe activity in system one (1) year ; Paper: hard copy of Lausche Lottery visitor log and temporary ID card/parking pass log in Security office six (6) months
